name: Whole Wheat Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Combine flours, baking powder, and salt. Stir mixture well.
Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal.
Add milk, stirring until dry ingredients are moistened.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Knead lightly 8 to 10 times.
Roll biscuit dough to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut dough with a 2-inch biscuit cutter.
Place on ungreased baking sheets.
Bake at 450 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes. Yield: 2 dozen.
NOTE: Biscuits may be frozen. To freeze, place uncooked biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet; cover and freeze until firm. Transfer frozen biscuits to plastic bags. To bake, place frozen biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet; bake at 400 degrees for 20 to 23 minutes.
